name: Relaxation Reflexology
description: A gentle rhythmic treatment targeting key reflex points to release muscle tension, ease anxiety, and calm the nervous system.

name: De-Stress Reflexology
description: Focused on stress-sensitive zones to regulate breathing, reduce cortisol response, and restore mental clarity.

name: Chronic Pain Reflexology
description: Designed for long-term pain conditions by stimulating reflex points linked to inflammation, nerves, and joint function.

name: Sole Serenity Therapy
description: A deeply grounding foot-focused session to revitalize tired feet and support full-body harmony.

name: Detox Reflexology
description: Targets liver, kidneys, and lymphatic pathways to support circulation and natural toxin elimination.

name: Femme Cycle Reflexology
description: Supports menstrual and hormonal balance by stimulating reproductive and endocrine reflex zones.

name: Face Detox Reflexology
description: Combines acupressure and lymphatic activation to improve skin tone, reduce puffiness, and relieve facial tension.

name: Little Feet Reflexology (Kids)
description: A gentle child-safe reflexology session aimed at sleep, digestion, and emotional calm for children aged 3-12.

name: Nasal Reflexology
description: Focuses on sinus-clearing points to improve airflow, ease congestion, and support respiratory comfort.

name: Vita Flex Reflexology
description: A Tibetan-inspired rolling reflex technique often paired with oils to stimulate energy flow and deep reset.
